gist.headline: PolliChatter joins the hive
gist.blurb: A sleek new dark-themed chat interface just landed in the ecosystem! PolliChatter brings our text, image, and audio models together in one cozy, unified space.
gist.summary: Added PolliChatter, a new dark-themed unified chat interface, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now access a sleek, all-in-one frontend to interact with Pollinations' text, image, and audio models.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a dark-themed chat app that combines text, image, and audio. Visuals should feature Polly the bee using a sleek, dark-mode retro computer or terminal, perhaps with headphones to represent the audio aspect. The Monitor Robot can display the dark chat interface. The scene should balance the 'dark mode' concept with the mandatory warm, cozy pastel and lime green palette.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, typing on a retro computer terminal with a sleek dark-mode screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). The chunky monitor robot sits nearby, its screen showing a dark chat interface. Soft pastel lavender and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
